◎简　　介  

　　Marta, in charge of delivering a large number of precious diamonds to a series of jewellers in Dubai. The woman works on behalf of a factory and it is not the first time that she has been entrusted with a load to be delivered abroad. Her departure is scheduled for dawn and Marta is preparing to spend the night with her beloved Bruno, a magician very much in love with her, takin...
